entries.definition:
c-b-ʾ load, weight; to care, to get ready, to pack. Of this root, يعبؤا yacbaʾu, occurs once in the Qurʾan.
يعبأ yacbaʾ [imperf. v., intrans.] to care, to concern oneself with, to be solicitous about (25:77) ما يعبؤ بكم ربي لولا دعاؤكم what weight have you in the estimation of my Lord [also interpreted as: what will my Lord do with you] if it were not for your supplication?

يعبأ yacbaʾ [imperf. v., intrans.] to care, to concern oneself with, to be solicitous about (25:77) ما يعبؤ بكم ربي لولا دعاؤكم what weight have you in the estimation of my Lord [also interpreted as: what will my Lord do with you] if it were not for your supplication?
